title: strawberry snack
description: a simple mod that adds a strawberry
body:
this is a simple mod that adds a strawberry item to minecraft 1.19.2 i hope you enjoy my mod that i made in mcreator its been my first time making a mod like this so i hope you enjoy my mod and i hope you like strawberrys then this mod brings strawberrys to minecraft its a fruit that you can grow in real life it has no crafting recpie which i will fix some time in the future am busy doing other things so i can't i recommend being in creative mod grab 64 strawberrys and then go back to survival or hardcore its up to you
can i use this in a modpack Yes
can i make addons for this mod Yes
